intended_use: Formus Hip is a preoperative surgical planning software. It is intended to assist qualified medical professionals in the preoperative planning of orthopedic surgical procedures.
intended_use_full: Formus Hip is a preoperative surgical planning software. It is intended to assist qualified medical professionals in the preoperative planning of orthopedic surgical procedures.
target_condition: Primary total hip arthroplasty requiring preoperative planning
ground_truth: Image processing accuracy validated against manual 3D segmentation by US board-registered radiologists; implant sizing validated against traditional templating methods by orthopaedic surgeons
other_metrics: Image Processing Accuracy - Dice coefficient (Hemipelvis: 0.95; Femur: 0.97); Mean Absolute Distance in mm (Hemipelvis: 1.15; Femur: 1.35); Hausdorff Distance in mm (Femoral head: 2.84; Acetabulum: 3.04); Implant Sizing - 94% (95% CI 0.947-0.998) of stems within ±2 sizes of ground truth; 98% (95% CI 0.885-0.974) of cups within ±2 sizes of ground truth
